title: Crosshair small, HUD big
description: Mini texturepack for those of us who use the GUI Scale at maximum (4), but it wants a crosshair more tiny as if using GUI Scale at 3.
body:
**"Crosshair Small, HUD big" is used with the HUD size at MAXIMUM. It recreates the default crosshair size at scale 3. It's tiny, comfortable, easy on the eyes, and doesn't require you to move your eyes to see what you're aiming at or see far away. Basically, it's like playing with scale 3, without losing the large inventory size.
¡The benefits are clear!**
![Comparation HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/311c82fecfda45f13dfdcb5f70f42e82c3dd0967.png)
**In addition to being centered, and solving the problem of the off-center crosshair, it is more convenient due to its "vanilla" size**

![Centered Crosshair](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fa78dbea001085341edacd5edbc51c0b90c40f3.png)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
I don't know if it works correctly with versions prior to 1.21.6. So it's not working correctly. Can you let me know so I can fix it with a compatible version?


</details>
